questions.question: Design a deep learning network architecture for forecasting daily temperature data, given historical temperature readings for the past 30 days. Consider using convolutional layers to extract relevant features from the time series data. Explain the rationale behind your choice of layers and activation functions.

Implement a Recurrent Neural Network (RNN) architecture using Keras for forecasting monthly sales data. The input data consists of sales figures for the past 12 months, with each value represented as a separate time series. Train the model on a sample dataset and evaluate its performance using the Mean Absolute Error (MAE) metric. What hyperparameters did you choose for the model, and why?

Compare the performance of a Convolutional Recurrent Neural Network (CRNN) with a LSTM network for forecasting weekly traffic volume data. Provide a table or plot to illustrate the results of your experiment, including the MAE and RMSE values for both models. What insights did you gain from this comparison, and how might they inform your choice of model for future forecasting tasks?
